key_findings: UMH substrate is production truth on VPS — 695 substrate files, 131 organism files
EOS has TWO divergent local sources: saas/ (partial v2 backend) and projections/eos (v1 integration + full agents)
CreatorOS and LyfeOS are integration stubs on VPS — full apps likely on Windows Beast
3 external sources uninspected: Google Docs, GitHub repos, Windows Beast /dev
Schema version split in EOS integration vs saas backend
